name: Peter's Favorite Strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and hull the strawberries. Cut them in half.
2. Slice the ends off the orange. Quarter the orange lengthwise and slice into thin wedges, leaving the rinds on.
3. Place the strawberries and oranges in a bowl and mix well.
4. Mix together the orange juice and sweet vermouth.
5. Drizzle over the fruit mixture and stir to combine.
6. Taste the berries and add sweetener if needed.
7. Cover the bowl and chill in the refrigerator for 2 hours before serving. Stir gently several times to blend flavors.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 FRUIT EXCHANGE; CAL: 56; CHO: 11g; PRO: 1g; FAT: 0g; SOD: 1mg; CHO: 0mg; LOW-SODIUM DIETS: This recipe is excellent.
